title: thelypteris decurtata subsp. platensis
intro: Thelypteris decurtata subsp. platensis is a subspecies of the Thelypteris decurtata fern, a plant species native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris decurtata subsp. platensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
